translations.en: a tall man with a disarming grin.
translations.zh: 一位高大男子，笑容令人卸下戒備。

translations.en: "Hello, mein freund
en."
His thick fingers grab your hand.
translations.zh: 他粗厚的手指握住汝的手。

translations.en: "You are back. Gut." He leans back on his heels.
translations.zh: 「汝回來了，很好。」他向後靠在腳跟上。

translations.en: "Ubermon @Kalbmilch."
"At your zervice." He snaps to attention.
"I @milk de cows und make de @cheese."
"You vant to buy someting, just say de word."
"You vant to buy someting, come by my dairy ven I'm open."
translations.zh: 「汝想買什麼，待在下開門時來乳品場。」

translations.en: "Come by my dairy ven I'm open, ja?"
translations.zh: 「待在下開門時來乳品場，好嗎？」

translations.en: "Ja, sure, vat you vant - milk or @cheese?"
translations.zh: 「好，當然，汝要什麼——牛奶還是@奶酪？」

translations.en: "Come by my dairy ven I'm open, ja?"
translations.zh: 「待在下開門時來乳品場，好嗎？」

translations.en: "Come by my dairy ven I'm open, ja?"
translations.zh: 「待在下開門時來乳品場，好嗎？」

translations.en: "Take care among ze British, now."
translations.zh: 「在不列顛人中間要多加留心。」

translations.en: "Now I not know vat you say."
"Which of you?"
"Vell, okay..."
"That'll be #1 crowns, okay?"
"Vell, okay, but is very good for you!"
"You have not ze gold right now."
"You don't have room to carry it."
"Good!" $N gives $Y the
cheese
milk

translator_notes: 108 Ubermon: 鴉爪鎮乳品場主，德語口音特色（vant/vell/ja/ze等）。在翻譯中保留異鄉人語氣但不過度誇張。賣牛奶和奶酪。
